hypothesis: A recursively composed section state might close at bounded size and distinguish eventual terminal 00.
interpretation: The dual is exactly self-replicating and level-transitive, while the actual word already realizes maximal iterated-section growth through depth eight. The universal section tower expands rather than closing; a useful recursive observable must quotient it using actual-orbit or multi-time structure.
limitations: does not prove the scan-state semigroup is free
the ordered-pair orbit law is checked only through depth four
the actual section-growth campaign is finite through depth eight
does not prove the alternating inverse lift has infinite support
does not exclude eventual center period two
does not solve Rule 30 center nonperiodicity
proof_scope: The self-replication witnesses and level-transitivity induction are all-depth statements proved in proofs/informal/problem1_period_two_dual_multiscale.md. Level orbits through depth eight, ordered-pair orbits through depth four, and actual section growth through depth eight are exact finite checks.
question: problem1

actual_section_growth.finite_conclusion: the actual block-32 word realizes all 4^d iterated sections through d=8
actual_section_growth.scientific_boundary: finite section growth does not prove all-depth freeness or infinite support

exact_conclusions.boundary_orbits: every infinite scan-state word has a dual orbit with all 4^d prefixes at every depth d
exact_conclusions.dual_level_transitivity: the invertible dual acts transitively on every finite level Q^d
exact_conclusions.multiscale_no_closure: the natural exact section hierarchy does not collapse to a small universal level orbit
exact_conclusions.next_target: use a quotient special to the unique actual fringe orbit or a multi-time seam identity, not the full universal section tower

pair_orbits.finite_pattern: 2d ordered-pair orbits at depth d through the checked range
pair_orbits.scientific_boundary: the 2d pair-orbit law is finite evidence, not an all-depth theorem here

self_replication.boundary_conclusion: every dual boundary orbit has all 4^d possible depth-d prefixes
self_replication.exact_conclusion: the dual action is self-replicating and level-transitive on Q^d for every d>=1
